heading: Review and report on adequacy of existing electoral fraud statutes and penalties
label: 21143 Review and report on adequacy of existing electoral fraud statutes and penalties
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 15543 of Title 42

children.text: whether additional statutory offenses are needed to secure the use of the Internet for election purposes; and
whether existing penalties provide adequate punishment and deterrence with respect to such offenses.

children.heading: Report
children.label: b Report
children.text: The Attorney General shall submit a report to the Committees on the Judiciary of the Senate and House of Representatives, the Committee on Rules and Administration of the Senate, and the Committee on House Administration of the House of Representatives on the review conducted under subsection (a) together with such recommendations for legislative and administrative action as the Attorney General determines appropriate.
